title: Note block records
description: You like note block music? This resourcepack replace records to note block style
body:
What if Mojang made music for records from sheet music?
This resource pack replaces the music on records with their remixes from sheet music.
- Tears,Precipice xylophone
- Mall, Wait 8bit
- Meloni, Relic, Stard piano
- Othrside, Relic, Ward organ
- Pigstep, Lava Chicken harmonica

Too cool to exist, but it's true. By the way, optifine is not required.
